data.title: CI: test-recipe-registry.sh fails with ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'jsonschema'
data.description:
## Problem

CI Script Tests job fails at test-recipe-registry.sh because jsonschema is not installed in the CI environment.

## Error

ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'jsonschema'

Tests affected:
- test_generative_recipe_type_valid
- test_transform_recipe_type_valid
- 7 total failures in test-recipe-registry.sh

## Expected Behavior

jsonschema should be available in CI (either installed in requirements or the test should handle missing dependency gracefully).

## Actual Behavior

CI fails with import error. Run: 24215560204

## Fix Direction

Either add jsonschema to the CI environment setup (pip install or requirements.txt), or add a graceful skip in the test when jsonschema is not available.
